history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A low-angle, black and white, grainy photograph captures a young man with messy, curly hair standing outdoors at night. He is wearing a plain black t-shirt and blue jeans, with a wristwatch on his left wrist. The man is looking upwards and to his right, with his mouth slightly open, as if exhaling smoke or speaking. He is standing next to a weathered wooden bench with slats. Behind him, a white wooden fence is visible. To his right is a building with a large, double-doored entrance, featuring a panel design and horizontal louvers on the lower half of each door. Above the door, on the building's facade, is a small, rectangular window and an electrical meter box with wires running from it. The overall lighting is dim and atmospheric, with strong shadows cast by the bench and fence onto the concrete ground. The mood is somewhat mysterious and candid, with the motion blur in the man's hair suggesting movement or a fleeting moment. The style is reminiscent of gritty urban photography or a candid snapshot.
